sources.delay_note: Daily Wikimedia Pageviews; the newest complete UTC day can arrive with a short delay.
FINRA consolidated TRF/ADF daily short-sale volume, normally posted by 18:00 ET. It is off-exchange reported volume and is not short interest.

sources.delay_note: No public social provider is active unless HYPEBOARD_SOCIAL_DATA_URL is configured.

limitations: Hype Score values are comparative proxies and not a percentage of retail ownership.
Daily source dates can differ because attention data can update when markets are closed.
FINRA short-sale volume is not the same as short interest and covers specified reported venues.
